use walkdir::WalkDir;

fn count_files(root: &str) -> (usize, Vec<String>) {
    let mut count = 0;
    let mut errors = Vec::new();
    for entry in WalkDir::new(root) {
        match entry {
            Ok(e) if e.file_type().is_file() => count += 1,
            Ok(_) => {}
            Err(e) => errors.push(format!("walk error: {}", e)),
        }
    }
    (count, errors)
}
